subject: OOM Integration Changes
commit_message:
OOM Integration Changes

Most of the issues have been cleaned out. Known remaining needed changes are:
- Removal of specifics, left has placeholder
- Addition of initContainers for managing dependencies
- Usage of the right configuration for connecting to other
  apps.
